titleStmt.title: SII 40.98: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 98. (A.R. No. B. 78 of 1930.) Tērāla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Siddhēśvara temple in the village.

Records the provision made for conducting offerings and burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Siddhēśvara at Teṟāla by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mailaladēvi-Kāmarāju of the Aihaya (Haihaya)-Vaṁśa. It contains the praśasti of the Haihayas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcama
hāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara
Ānēkottaṁgga taraṁga saṁghā
ta lavaṇōdadiḷāvala
yavaḷayeta gaṁgāpa¨ryyaṁ
taka madhyadēśādhīsvara mahēsvara
puravarēsvara naihaya vaṁśō
ddva nātrēyagōtrō pavitra na
tṛgranarasirada¨rppanōdhvaja
māppaṟa gosaṇa sahasra
bāhu pratāpa vīraguṇa sa
madana śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷē
svara maIlaladēvi kāmaraju
teṟala siddesvara dēvaraku nayi
dyamu divveku sa¨rvvapariyaramu
kānu teṟala[Ibha]tra sēraku
koḍuku kāpurajayana daṁpa
galavāḍu dīni Evvaru konnā
gaṁgakaṟutta vēkavilala po
ḍicina papamu tana pedda ko
ḍuku kapalana kuḍicinavāru
maha nakṣatra muhaḷa
sadevasa nakṣatra
mu bhareni
Digital edition of SII 40.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
